description_long: This object consists of three bicycles and several disassembled bicycle parts, including frames, wheels, and handlebars. The bicycles are of standard urban design, each featuring a diamond-shaped frame, two wheels, flat handlebars, and a standard saddle. The frames are painted in distinct colors: black, red, and yellow-green, with matching or contrasting seats and handlebar grips. The wheels are spoked with thin tires, suitable for city riding, and the pedals, chains, and cranks are visible on the assembled bikes. The disassembled parts include a loose wheel and two separated frames, suggesting maintenance or assembly activity. The overall appearance is that of modern, utilitarian bicycles commonly found in urban environments.
description: A group of three urban bicycles in black, red, and yellow-green, with diamond frames, flat handlebars, and standard saddles, accompanied by several disassembled parts.
description_view_0: Three assembled bicycles and several disassembled parts are visible, showing the frames, wheels, and handlebars from a side perspective.
description_view_1: The bicycles and parts are seen from the front, highlighting the alignment of the wheels and the flat handlebars.
description_view_2: A rear-side view reveals the back wheels, seat posts, and the arrangement of the disassembled frames and wheels.
description_view_3: The bicycles are viewed from the opposite front angle, emphasizing the handlebar shapes and the spatial arrangement of the bikes and parts.
